zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Northwode於1307年3月26日出生在英國艾可沙爾福德時，他的父親Sir John Northwode II28歲，母親Agnes de Grandison19歲。他於1322年3月23日與Juliana de Saye結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年11月5日在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Northwode于1307年3月26日出生在英国艾可沙爾福德时，他的父亲Sir John Northwode II28岁，母亲Agnes de Grandison19岁。他于1322年3月23日与Juliana de Saye结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年11月5日在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Northwode was born on 26 March 1307, in Shalford, Essex, England, his father, Sir John Northwode II, was 28 and his mother, Agnes de Grandison, was 19. He married Juliana de Saye on 23 March 1322. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 November 1361, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Northwode est né le 26 mars 1307, à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Northwode II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Grandison, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Juliana de Saye le 23 mars 1322. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 novembre 1361, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Northwode am 26. März 1307 in Shalford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Northwode II 28 und seine Mutter Agnes de Grandison 19. Er hat am 23. März 1322 Juliana de Saye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. November 1361 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Northwode è nato il il 26 marzo 1307 nel Shalford, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Northwode II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Grandison, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Juliana de Saye il 23 marzo 1322. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 novembre 1361, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Northwodeが1307年3月26日にイギリスエセックスシャルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John Northwode IIは28歳，母Agnes de Grandisonは19歳であった。1322年3月23日にJuliana de Sayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年11月5日に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Northwode(이)가 1307년 3월 26일 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Northwode II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Grandison(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1322년 3월 23일 Juliana de Saye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 11월 5일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.26 March 1307–5 November 1361: 26 de março de 1307–5 de novembro de 1361
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Northwode nasceu em 26 de março de 1307, em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Northwode II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Grandison, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana de Saye em 23 de março de 1322. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de novembro de 1361, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Northwode родился 26 марта 1307 г. в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Northwode II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Grandison, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana de Saye 23 марта 1322 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 ноября 1361 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.

es.26 March 1307–5 November 1361: 26 de marzo de 1307–5 de noviembre de 1361
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Northwode nació el 26 de marzo de 1307, en Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Northwode II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes de Grandison, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Juliana de Saye el 23 de marzo de 1322. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de noviembre de 1361, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años.
